zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland於1266年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾洛包時，他的父親Nicolas De Soules19歲，母親Margaret Comyn1歲。他於1274年之後與Hawise Stewart在英國薩默塞特卡素 加里結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1304年被列為deposed as guardian of scotland by edward i of england who appointed john of brittany, earl of richmond。他去世於1311年1月4日在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾洛包享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland于1266年出生在苏格兰洛包爾洛包时，他的父亲Nicolas De Soules19岁，母亲Margaret Comyn1岁。他于1274年之后与Hawise Stewart在英国薩默塞特卡素 加里结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1304年被列为deposed as guardian of scotland by edward i of england who appointed john of brittany, earl of richmond。他去世于1311年1月4日在英国苏格兰洛包爾洛包享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Soulis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Greek: possibly a nickname derived from Albanian shul ‘bolt of wood’, figuratively ‘brawny man’ and ‘tall dolt’.
Scottish (Ayrshire): variant of   Soule  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Shaulis
meanings: Altered form of Lithuanian Šaulys: occupational name from šaulys ‘rifleman’. Compare Soulis .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland was born in 1266, in Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, Nicolas De Soules, was 19 and his mother, Margaret Comyn, was 1. He married Hawise Stewart after 1274, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1304, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as deposed as guardian of scotland by edward i of england who appointed john of brittany, earl of richmond. He died on 4 January 1311, in Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland est né en 1266, à Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Nicolas De Soules, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Comyn, avait 1 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Stewart après 1274, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1304, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est deposed as guardian of scotland by edward i of england who appointed john of brittany, earl of richmond. Il est décédé le 4 janvier 1311, à Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland 1266 in Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolas De Soules 19 und seine Mutter Margaret Comyn 1. Er hat nach 1274 in Castle Cary, Somerset, England Hawise Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1304, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als deposed as guardian of scotland by edward i of england who appointed john of brittany, earl of richmond aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. Januar 1311 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland è nato il nel 1266 nel Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Nicolas De Soules, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Comyn, aveva 1 anni. Lui sposato Hawise Stewart dopo il 1274, nel Castle Cary, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1304, all'età di 38 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come deposed as guardian of scotland by edward i of england who appointed john of brittany, earl of richmond. Morì il 4 gennaio 1311, nel Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotlandが1266年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアロクスブルグで生まれた時，父Nicolas De Soulesは19歳，母Margaret Comynは1歳であった。1274年以後にイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイでHawise Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1304年，38歳の時，職業はdeposed as guardian of scotland by edward i of england who appointed john of brittany, earl of richmondと記録されている。彼は1311年1月4日にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアロクスブルグで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland(이)가 1266년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 록스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolas De Soules(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Comyn(은)는 1세였다. 그는 1274년 이후 영국 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 Hawise Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1304년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 deposed as guardian of scotland by edward i of england who appointed john of brittany, earl of richmond이었다. 그는 1311년 1월 4일 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 록스버그에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland nasceu em 1266, em Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Nicolas De Soules, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Comyn, tinha 1 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise Stewart após 1274, em Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1304, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como deposed as guardian of scotland by edward i of england who appointed john of brittany, earl of richmond. Ele faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1311, em Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland родился в 1266 г. в местности роксбург, роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Nicolas De Soules было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Comyn, 1. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Stewart после 1274 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1304 году, в возрасте 38 лет,  он работал по профессии deposed as guardian of scotland by edward i of england who appointed john of brittany, earl of richmond. Он умер 4 января 1311 г. в местности роксбург, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland nació en 1266, en Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Nicolas De Soules, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margaret Comyn, tenía 1 años. Se casó con Hawise Stewart después de 1274, en Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1304, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era deposed as guardian of scotland by edward i of england who appointed john of brittany, earl of richmond. Murió el 4 de enero de 1311, en Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
